boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Enrollment authority defect remains open; AUTH-ZEN-080 confirms C11 consent pending
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: AUTH-ZEN-080 controls enrollment authority and confirms C11 enrollment authority pending despite matching site, protocol, and activation date
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect in enrollment authority blocks closure; resolution pathway identified
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: AUTH-ZEN-080 shows consent C11 enrollment authority pending before 2026-06-28 activation date

critical_features_preserved: AUTH-ZEN-080 as controlling source for enrollment authority
FEAS-ZEN-080 is planning artifact only, not activation authority
Exact-match rule requires enrollment authority before enrollment
Consent C11 status pending as stated in AUTH-ZEN-080
final_answer: The action boundary remains open because AUTH-ZEN-080 confirms consent C11 enrollment authority is pending, despite matching site, protocol, and activation date. STD-ZEN-080-P requires all elements closed before enrollment. Resolution requires either an updated AUTH-ZEN-080 confirming C11 enrollment authority or a consent amendment establishing supplemental enrollment authority. FEAS-ZEN-080 cannot substitute for enrollment activation authority.
open_blockers: All elements must close per STD-ZEN-080-P before enrollment
Resolution requires updated AUTH or consent amendment
